title: MinecartSpeedUnlimiter
description: Mod for a new snapshot that makes minecart go insanse speed
body:
# Unlimit your speed
Simple minecraft mod that lets minecart accelerate to a giant speed of **1.7976931348623157e+308** (Double.MAX_VALUE)

## Usage
/gamerule minecartMaxSpeed 1000 makes it go fast!

## Unique features

### 1.1.0
Now you can buff **tnt minecarts** with **strenght** potion
This feature can be enabled with 
```
/gamerule usePotionTNTMinecartBuffing
```
Each potion gives some additional explosion power.
You can change impact of potions on minecart with gamerule

```
/gamerule onePotionTntMinecartBuff 
```
Gamerule accepts integer value in **range** of [1, 10]

_I may change this range in the future._
